---
title: "Model_EDA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Spatial Temporal SVR result analysis

## Result for first 3 area

```{r}
test_results_all
```

```{r}
top_msoa <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(accident_count)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice(1:3) %>%
  pull(.data[[cscale]])

plot_subset <- test_results_all %>%
  filter(.data[[cscale]] %in% top_msoa)

ggplot(plot_subset, aes(x = time_date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = accident_count, group = .data[[cscale]], color = .data[[cscale]]), size = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Predicted_stsvr, group = .data[[cscale]], color = .data[[cscale]]), linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~.data[[cscale]], scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Map

```{r}
library(tmap)
source('../utils/map_func.R')
tmap_mode('plot')
starima_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_starima, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "STARIMA: Residual Map"
  )

gcn_lstm_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_gcn_lstm, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "GCN-LSTM: Residual Map"
  )

stsvr_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_stsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "STSVR: Residual Map"
  )

stgcn_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_stgcn, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "STGCN: Residual Map"
  )


residual_layout <- tmap_arrange(arima_lstm_map, tsvr_map,
                                starima_map, stsvr_map,
                                ncol = 2)

tmap_save(residual_layout, filename = "../Data/Layout/residual_maps.png", width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
arima_lstm_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_arima, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "ARIMA: Residual Map"
  )

tsvr_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_tsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "SVR: Residual Map"
  )

ann_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_ann, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "ANN: Residual Map"
  )

tgcn_map <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(.data[[cscale]]) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_residual = mean(accident_count - Predicted_tgcn, na.rm = TRUE),
    geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  st_as_sf()%>%
  tm_shape() +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "avg_residual",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Avg Residual")) +
  add_map_decorations() +
  tm_layout(
    title = "TGCN: Residual Map"
  )

residual_layout <- tmap_arrange(ann_map, tgcn_map,
                                stgcn_map, gcn_lstm_map,
                                ncol = 2)

tmap_save(residual_layout, filename = "../Data/Layout/residual_maps_2.png", width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)

```

# Compare All models

```{r}
aggregate_all_models <- test_results_all %>%
  group_by(time_date) %>%
  summarise(
    actual_sum = sum(accident_count),
    mse_tsvr_mean = mean(mse_tsvr, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_tsvr = sum(Predicted_tsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_stsvr_mean = mean(mse_stsvr, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_stsvr = sum(Predicted_stsvr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_starima_mean = mean(mse_starima, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_starima = sum(Predicted_starima, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_arima_mean = mean(mse_arima, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_arima = sum(Predicted_arima, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_tgcn_mean = mean(mse_tgcn, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_tgcn = sum(Predicted_tgcn, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_ann_mean = mean(mse_ann, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_ann = sum(Predicted_ann, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_gcn_lstm_mean = mean(mse_gcn_lstm, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_gcn_lstm = sum(Predicted_gcn_lstm, na.rm = TRUE),
    mse_stgcn_mean = mean(mse_stgcn, na.rm = TRUE), Predicted_stgcn = sum(Predicted_stgcn, na.rm = TRUE),
  )
```

```{r}

compare_split_plot <- aggregate_all_models %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Predicted"),
    names_to = "Model",
    values_to = "Predicted"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Model_Group = case_when(
      Model %in% c("Predicted_tsvr", "Predicted_stsvr") ~ "SVR Models",
      Model %in% c("Predicted_arima", "Predicted_starima") ~ "ARIMA Models",
      Model %in% c("Predicted_ann", "Predicted_tgcn", "Predicted_stgcn", "Predicted_gcn_lstm") ~ "Deep Learning Models"
    ),
    Model_Group = factor(Model_Group, levels = c("ARIMA Models", "SVR Models", "Deep Learning Models"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x = time_date, y = actual_sum, color = "Actual"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(x = time_date, y = Predicted, color = Model), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ Model_Group, ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Actual" = "#1e23b3", 
               "Predicted_stsvr" = "#63e0ff", "Predicted_tsvr" = "#25b7db",
               "Predicted_starima" = "#2fad6e", "Predicted_arima" = "#1a633f",
               "Predicted_ann" = "#d465d6", "Predicted_tgcn" = "#9b819c",
               "Predicted_gcn_lstm" = "#ff7f00", "Predicted_stgcn" = "#311c45"),
    labels = function(x) toupper(gsub("Predicted_", "", x))
  ) +
  labs(title = "Traffic Accident Predictions by Model Category", y = "Accidents", x = "Date") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#f0f0f0", color = "grey50"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11), 
    legend.position = "right"
  )

compare_split_plot
ggsave(file = "../Data/Layout/time_based_two_model_compare_split.png", compare_split_plot, width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
avg_mse_svr <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_stsvr_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_tsvr <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_tsvr_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_starima <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_starima_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_arima <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_arima_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_tgcn <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_tgcn_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_ann <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_ann_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_lstmgcn <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_gcn_lstm_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
avg_mse_stgcn <- round(mean(aggregate_all_models$mse_stgcn_mean, na.rm = TRUE), 3)

# create table for MSE
tb <- tibble(
  Model = c("STSVR", "TSVR", "STARIMA", "ARIMA", "ANN", "TGCN", "GCN+LSTM", "STGCN"),
  MSE = c(avg_mse_svr, avg_mse_tsvr, avg_mse_starima, avg_mse_arima, avg_mse_ann, avg_mse_tgcn, avg_mse_lstmgcn, avg_mse_stgcn),
)
tb
```
